title: Agent Tool Call Loop
interaction_flow: Promptable → Promptable: getProvidersAndModels() → resolves provider + model (from method, attribute, or config)
Provider(GeneratesText) → TextGateway: onToolInvocation(invokingCb, invokedCb) — registers event callbacks
TextGateway(OpenAiGateway) → TextGateway: buildTextRequestBody(...) — maps messages, tools, schema
TextGateway(OpenAiGateway) → LLM API: POST /responses {model, instructions, input, tools, ...}
LLM API → TextGateway: HTTP response JSON {id, output, usage, status}
TextGateway → TextGateway: push Step(text, toolCalls, [], finishReason, usage, meta) to $steps
TextGateway(InvokesTools) → TextGateway: findTool($toolCall->name, $tools) — match by class_basename
TextGateway(InvokesTools) → EventDispatcher: invokingToolCallback(Tool, arguments) → dispatch InvokingTool event
Tool → TextGateway: returns JSON string of results (or 'No relevant results found.')
TextGateway(InvokesTools) → EventDispatcher: toolInvokedCallback(Tool, arguments, result) → dispatch ToolInvoked event
TextGateway: build ToolResult(id, name, arguments, result, resultId) for each call
TextGateway → TextGateway: update Step with toolResults, push ToolResultMessage to $messages
TextGateway(OpenAiGateway) → LLM API: POST /responses {model, previous_response_id, input:[{type:function_call_output, call_id, output}], tools}
LLM API → TextGateway: next HTTP response JSON
--- END LOOP (finishReason !== ToolCalls OR steps >= maxSteps) ---
TextGateway → TextGateway: build final TextResponse(text, combinedUsage, meta).withMessages($messages).withSteps($steps)
Provider(GeneratesText) → Provider: wrap into AgentResponse($invocationId, text, usage, meta).withToolCallsAndResults().withSteps()
loop_termination_conditions: finishReason !== ToolCalls (provider returned a text/stop response)
steps.count >= maxSteps (default: round(count($tools) * 1.5), overridable via TextGenerationOptions::maxSteps or #[MaxSteps] attribute)

key_classes_and_methods.AnonymousAgent: implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools; uses Promptable; constructor(instructions, messages, tools)
key_classes_and_methods.Promptable::prompt(): public prompt(string, attachments, provider, model, timeout): AgentResponse — delegates to withModelFailover()
key_classes_and_methods.Promptable::withModelFailover(): iterates provider+model pairs, catches FailoverableException, dispatches AgentFailedOver event
key_classes_and_methods.GeneratesText::prompt(): creates UUID invocationId, runs middleware pipeline, calls textGateway()->generateText(), fires PromptingAgent + AgentPrompted events
key_classes_and_methods.GeneratesText::listenForToolInvocations(: registers onToolInvocation callbacks on gateway; fires InvokingTool / ToolInvoked events
key_classes_and_methods.TextGateway::generateText(): interface method: builds request, posts to API, parses response — returns TextResponse
key_classes_and_methods.ParsesTextResponses::processResponse(): core recursive loop: extract text+toolCalls, if ToolCalls→executeToolCalls→continueWithToolResults(depth+1), else build final TextResponse
key_classes_and_methods.ParsesTextResponses::executeToolCalls(): iterates ToolCall[], findTool by class_basename, executeTool(), returns ToolResult[]
key_classes_and_methods.InvokesTools::executeTool(): fires invokingCb, calls tool->handle(new Request($arguments)), fires invokedCb, returns string result
key_classes_and_methods.ParsesTextResponses::continueWithToolRes: POSTs to /responses with previous_response_id + function_call_output inputs, recurses into processResponse()
key_classes_and_methods.SimilaritySearch::handle(): calls $this->using closure with query string, optionally reranks Collection, returns JSON string
key_classes_and_methods.SimilaritySearch::usingModel(): static factory: wraps Model::query()->whereVectorSimilarTo() in closure
key_classes_and_methods.AgentPrompt: extends Prompt; holds agent, attachments (Collection), timeout; provider+model from parent
key_classes_and_methods.Tool (interface): description(): string; handle(Request): string; schema(JsonSchema): array

key_data_objects.ToolCall: id, name, arguments[], resultId, reasoningId, reasoningSummary
key_data_objects.Step: text, toolCalls[], toolResults[], finishReason, usage, meta
key_data_objects.TextResponse: text, usage, meta; withMessages(), withSteps(), withToolCallsAndResults()
key_data_objects.AgentResponse: invocationId, text, usage, meta; withMessages(), withSteps(), withToolCallsAndResults()
key_data_objects.FinishReason: enum: Stop | ToolCalls | Length | Error | Unknown

events_dispatched: InvokingTool($invocationId, $toolInvocationId, Agent, Tool, arguments) — before tool->handle()
ToolInvoked($invocationId, $toolInvocationId, Agent, Tool, arguments, result) — after tool->handle()
AgentPrompted($invocationId, AgentPrompt, AgentResponse) — after full response received
important_notes: The loop is implemented as a recursive call to processResponse() via continueWithToolResults(), not a while loop
OpenAI Responses API stateful continuation: follow-up calls use previous_response_id instead of re-sending full message history
maxSteps defaults to round(count($tools) * 1.5); overridable via TextGenerationOptions or #[MaxSteps] attribute on the agent class
Tool lookup uses class_basename() matching — tool name in LLM response must equal PHP class name (e.g. 'SimilaritySearch')
SimilaritySearch accepts a Closure for the search backend; usingModel() factory uses Eloquent whereVectorSimilarTo()
Optional reranking in SimilaritySearch: Collection->rerank($by, $query, limit) called before returning results
Middleware pipeline can modify AgentPrompt before sending to provider (e.g. RememberConversation appends history)
Provider failover: FailoverableException triggers next provider/model in list; non-failoverable exceptions propagate immediately
